channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 Unclecheng-li/poc-lab (369 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Unclecheng-li

📝 Repository: Unclecheng-li/poc-lab

📄 Descrizione: Recent CVE PoC & reproduction scripts. Focused on high-severity vulnerabilities across Linux kernel, Windows, macOS and more.

⭐ Stelle: 369

🍴 Forks: 67

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: c cybersecurity linux poc python python3 vulnerability

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-20T13:31:52Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-26T05:56:55Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 AmmarkoV/SAM3DBody-cpp (347 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: AmmarkoV

📝 Repository: AmmarkoV/SAM3DBody-cpp

📄 Descrizione: Real-time 3D full-body reconstruction from a single camera, Multiperson BVH output, Pure C++ runtime, ONNX + ggml, 70-joint skeleton with hands.

⭐ Stelle: 347

🍴 Forks: 42

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: 3d-human-pose bvh computer-vision cpp cuda ggml motion-capture multi-person-pose-estimation onnx opengl pose-detection pose-estimation pose-tracking real-time sam-3d-body

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-24T08:12:55Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-30T05:17:38Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 c0deJedi/nbd-vram (175 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: c0deJedi

📝 Repository: c0deJedi/nbd-vram

📄 Descrizione: Use your NVIDIA GPU's VRAM as swap space on Linux. Built for laptops with soldered memory and no upgrade path. If you have an RTX card sitting there with 8GB of VRAM and you're getting swapped to SSD, this puts that VRAM to work

⭐ Stelle: 175

🍴 Forks: 3

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: cuda gpu laptop linux memory nbd nvidia swap vram

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-30T15:21:16Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-03T06:40:29Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 routedeskbeam/CS2-External-Cheat-2026 (161 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: routedeskbeam

📝 Repository: routedeskbeam/CS2-External-Cheat-2026

📄 Descrizione: ⭐️ CS2 External Cheat delivers powerful aimbot, ESP wallhack, triggerbot, no-recoil, skin changer, and rage/legit features. Latest 2026 build with HWID spoofer, menu loader, and full injector support for Windows 10/11 Steam. Undetected. ⭐️

⭐ Stelle: 161

🍴 Forks: 0

item.title: 📝 X-3306/Project-Onyx (89 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: X-3306

📝 Repository: X-3306/Project-Onyx

📄 Descrizione: Advanced EDR Evasion via AI Telemetry Spoofing & WASM Sandboxing. Project Onyx is a PoC Red Team pipeline designed to demonstrate advanced evasion techniques against modern EDR systems. It shifts away from traditional signature-based obfuscation towards behavioral camouflage and strict environmental keying.

⭐ Stelle: 89

🍴 Forks: 11

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: ai av-bypass chain cpp cryptography edr-evasion in-memory-execution malware-development monolithic onnx onnxruntime redteam reverse-engineering security-research systems-security wasm webassembly windows

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-24T20:14:02Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-29T12:32:13Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 aimardcr/akane-injector (81 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: aimardcr

📝 Repository: aimardcr/akane-injector

📄 Descrizione: A kernel-assisted shared-library injector for Android. Loads any .so into a target process without ptrace, in-process dlopen, or visible traces in /proc/<pid>/maps. GKI 2.0 (Android 12-16).

⭐ Stelle: 81

🍴 Forks: 16

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: android anti-detection arm64 frida gki injection kernel-module ptrace-free

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-30T20:21:09Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-05T03:35:58Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 overducast/RiftByte (16 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: overducast

📝 Repository: overducast/RiftByte

📄 Descrizione: Binary diff tool for PE (EXE/DLL) and ELF files. Compares two binaries, resolves virtual addresses, decodes x86/x64/ARM instructions, identifies changed sections, and exports a human-readable log and an x64dbg-compatible .1337 patch file. Supports x32, x64, ARM32, ARM64.

⭐ Stelle: 16

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-04T20:55:18Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-08T01:12:53Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 volcengine/continue-profiling-agent (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: volcengine

📝 Repository: volcengine/continue-profiling-agent

📄 Descrizione: Non-intrusive Linux whole-machine continuous profiling agent that records second-level CPU profiling history with ultra-low, often unnoticeable overhead, powered by libgunwinder. Deployed at scale inside ByteDance to significantly accelerate performance issue diagnosis.

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0
